summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Peste Negra band website. All 7 backend API tests passed. All major frontend features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is under 200 lines - no splitting needed
All endpoints exclude _id from MongoDB responses correctly
No auth needed per requirements - public site is fine
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Fan, TEST_PLAYWRIGHT guestbook entries; TEST_pestenegra@test.com and TEST_dup@test.com mailing list entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Hero/nav/music/videos/merch/guestbook/mailing-list/social-links/footer marquee/mobile-menu all tested and passing. Backend APIs all return 200. Guestbook textarea placeholder is 'SPEAK...' not 'MESSAGE'. Use #guestbook input and #guestbook textarea selectors.

test_results.hero_section: PASS - background image, band logo, tagline, CTA button all visible
test_results.navigation: PASS - all 6 links: MUSIC, VIDEOS, MERCH, SHOWS, GUESTBOOK, CONTACT
test_results.guestbook_post: PASS - entry created and shown in terminal-style list
test_results.guestbook_list: PASS - entries displayed with timestamp and name in red
test_results.social_links: PASS - YouTube, Spotify, Apple Music, Bandcamp, Instagram, Facebook
test_results.mobile_menu: PASS - hamburger/X toggle works, shows all nav links
